overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a haunted wooden barn interior with spectral wraiths, ascending to an upper floor overlooking a scenic lakeside view, then exiting to walk along the waterfront. The clip transitions from dimly lit indoor environments to bright natural outdoor lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor of rustic wooden barn with stone flooring

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the ground floor of the barn, observing the surroundings and spectral entities

notable_agents.action: ghostly wraith floating and drifting through the air near the wooden cart

entered.detail: thick wooden structural posts supporting the upper floor and roof
rough cobblestone flooring covering the ground level interior
old wooden wagon with broken wheels abandoned against the wall
stacked wooden barrels near the wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the ground floor of a dimly lit wooden barn with stone flooring and thick support pillars. Ghostly wraiths float through the air as he walks past an abandoned wooden cart and barrels, heading toward a staircase in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase connecting ground to upper floor

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden staircase to the upper floor

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden stairs, hand visible on the railing

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with handrails leading upward
vertical wooden planks forming the stairwell walls

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep wooden staircase enclosed by plank walls, transitioning from the stone ground floor to the upper level of the barn. The lighting remains dim and artificial throughout the climb.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor loft with open doorway overlooking lake

events.description: reaches upper floor with wooden planks and blood stains visible
bright natural sunlight streams through large open doorway revealing exterior view

agents.ego_description: walking to the open doorway and pausing to look out at the scenic lake view

entered.detail: wooden plank flooring of the upper loft area
dark red blood stains scattered across the wooden floor
tall open doorway leading to exterior with bright light streaming in
calm blue lake visible through the doorway
wooden pier extending into the lake with a boat moored alongside
small sailing vessel with mast docked at the pier

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the upper floor, the character walks across blood-stained wooden planks toward a large open doorway. Bright sunlight streams in revealing a stunning view of a calm lake, wooden dock, and sailing boat with mountains in the distance. The character pauses to observe the scenic waterfront vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending staircase and ground floor exit corridor

events.description: turns away from the view and begins descending the stairs
approaches and exits through the ground floor doorway to exterior

agents.ego_description: turning away from the lake view, descending the stairs, and walking toward the ground floor exit

entered.detail: ground level exit doorway leading outside to the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the scenic overlook and descends the wooden stairs back to the ground floor. Walking through the stone-floored interior, he approaches a ground-level doorway with bright exterior light visible, preparing to exit the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny lakeside shore with dock and boat

events.description: exits the wooden building into bright sunny exterior waterfront area

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel shore path toward the lake and docked boat

entered.detail: sandy gravel path along the waterfront
lush green leafy trees and bushes surrounding the area
exterior view of the wooden building just exited
rocky and sandy shoreline along the calm water

segments.scene_description: Stepping out of the barn into bright sunlight, the character walks along a gravel path beside the calm lake shore. Lush green trees line the path while the wooden dock and sailing boat sit peacefully in the water ahead, with mountains visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic, haunted interior of a wooden barn into a bright, expansive lakeside landscape. It begins on a dimly lit stone ground floor where ghostly wraiths float past abandoned carts and barrels, before the camera follows the character as he ascends a steep wooden staircase enclosed by plank walls. As the character reaches the upper level, the dim interior gives way to brilliant sunlight streaming through an open doorway, revealing a scenic vista of a calm lake, a sailing boat, and distant mountains. The scene then shifts as the camera descends back through the stone-floored interior toward a ground-level exit, transitioning from the shadows of the barn into the vivid outdoor light. Finally, the movement opens up completely as the character steps onto a gravel path, walking along the lush green shoreline toward the peaceful waterfront.
